docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, PEDRO AS TO DEFENDANT KUNZ, NORMAN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, PEDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNZ, NORMAN AN INDIVIDUAL $5,413.10 PRINCIPAL, $31.78 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,669.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
